items.name: Taunt: The Boxtrot
items.item_description:
Spy 嘲諷
用這原汁原味的匿蹤裝備到處偷偷摸摸吧。
使用前進／後退鍵移動
並用平移鍵轉向。

items.item_description:

粉碎您的敵人！

items.name: A Well Wrapped Hat
items.item_name: 一頂細心包裝好的禮帽

items.name: Taunt: The Fubar Fanfare
items.item_description:
Soldier 嘲諷
「自由是要代價的，你們這些死蟲子！猜猜多少錢！錯啦！太多了！自由才沒那麼貴！」

items.name: Taunt: Disco Fever
items.item_description:
Spy 嘲諷
顛簸舞過漫山遍海的敵人屍骨吧。

items.name: Taunt: The Balloonibouncer
items.item_description:
Pyro 嘲諷
騎上這隻散播歡樂的玻璃纖維彈簧坐騎，將您的煩惱一把燒盡吧。

items.name: Taunt: The Dueling Banjo
items.item_description:
Community Created Engineer Taunt
Celebrate one of the two things everyone remembers from the 1972 Burt Reynolds classic, Deliverance.

items.name: Taunt: The Russian Arms Race
items.item_description:
Community Created Heavy Taunt
Get Pushkin, comrade! Own the means of lactic acid production!

items.name: Taunt: The Soviet Strongarm
items.item_description:
社群創作的 Heavy 嘲諷
如果您的二頭肌夠強壯，那又何須鍛煉腿部。

items.name: Taunt: The Jumping Jack
items.item_description:
社群創作的 Engineer 嘲諷
如果你真喜歡騎著鑽地機蹦蹦跳。那你也肯定能忍受能把你絕子絕孫的震動與不適。

items.name: Taunt: The Headcase
items.item_description:
社群創作的火焰兵嘲諷
朋友，讓我們為這位獻身成為美食的人默哀一秒。
